summary: Completed verification testing after runtime fix and selector hardening. The main runtime issue 'Unexpected token <' has been successfully resolved, and service worker cleanup is working correctly. However, birthday form direct input selectors are not accessible as expected due to Field component overriding data-testid attributes.

minor_issues.issue: Demo customer occasionally has no active promo code
minor_issues.impact: Minor - affects promo validation testing but not core functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Field component overrides input data-testid attributes, making direct input selectors inaccessible
ui_bugs.selector: Field component clones children and replaces data-testid with field-level testId
ui_bugs.details: Input elements have correct data-testid in code but Field component overrides them. Field wrapper selectors work (e.g., birthday-full-name-input-field) but direct input selectors don't (e.g., birthday-full-name-input)

ui_bugs.issue: Calendar overlay intercepts pointer events causing interaction issues
ui_bugs.selector: birthday-celebration-date-button works but calendar interactions are problematic

integration_issues.issue: Login page input selectors not consistently found during automated testing

passed_tests: No 'Unexpected token <' runtime error on load
Home page loads and renders correctly
Birthday page loads and renders correctly
Backend API endpoints (97.3% success rate - 36/37 tests)
Public bootstrap endpoint with menu/events/specials data
Admin CRUD operations for events and specials
Admin dashboard KPIs and data display
Birthday form field wrapper selectors are accessible
Birthday form visual rendering and layout
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Field component in birthday form to preserve both field-level and input-level data-testid attributes. The Field component currently overrides input data-testid attributes, making direct input selectors inaccessible for testing. Consider modifying the Field component to add field-level testId without removing existing input-level data-testid attributes.
